name: 29_Financial_Time_Series_Prediction_LSTM_ML
query: Je, unaweza kunisaidia kuanzisha mfumo wa utabiri wa mfululizo wa muda wa kifedha kwa kutumia mfano wa LSTM na Uchambuzi wa Kifedha wa ulimwengu halisi, kama bei za hisa au bei za Bitcoin? Kwanza, tutahitaji kusafisha data, tukishughulikia thamani zilizokosekana na vipimo vya nje katika `src/data_loader.py`. Kisha, hebu tukaibadilishe data ya mfululizo wa muda kuwa muundo wa kujifunza unaosimamiwa kwa kutumia dirisha la muda katika `src/data_loader.py`. Hatimaye tumia mfano wa LSTM kwa utabiri, ambapo mfano wa LSTM unatekelezwa katika `src/model.py`. Ukishapata utabiri, hifadhi matokeo kama `results/prediction_results.txt`. Unda dashibodi ya maingiliano inayoonyesha matokeo ya utabiri kwa kutumia Dash na hifadhi utekelezaji katika `src/visualize.py`. Hatimaye, ningefurahia hati ya Markdown inayoonyesha usanifu wa mfano, mchakato wa mafunzo, na uchambuzi wa utendaji, iliyohifadhiwa kama `results/report.md`. Hakikisha mfumo unasimamia kuanza na kusimamisha programu ya Dash kiotomatiki ili kuokoa rasilimali. Asante sana!

requirements.criteria: Baadhi ya data halisi ya mfululizo wa muda wa kifedha (mfano, "bei za hisa" au "bei za Bitcoin") inapakuliwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Usafishaji wa data unafanywa, ikiwa ni pamoja na kushughulikia thamani zilizokosekana na vipimo vya nje katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Dirisha la muda linatumika kubadilisha data ya mfululizo wa muda kuwa tatizo la kujifunza linalosimamiwa. Tafadhali tekeleza hili katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Mfano wa "LSTM" unatumika kwa utabiri wa mfululizo wa muda wa kifedha na unatekelezwa katika `src/model.py`.
Dashibodi ya maingiliano ya kuona matokeo ya utabiri inaundwa kwa kutumia "Dash". Utekelezaji unahifadhiwa katika `src/visualize.py`.
Hati ya Markdown inayoonyesha usanifu wa mfano, mchakato wa mafunzo, na uchambuzi wa utendaji inazalishwa, na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/report.md`.

preferences.criteria: Dashibodi ya "Dash" inapaswa kuruhusu watumiaji kuingiliana na matokeo ya utabiri, kuwezesha uchunguzi wa vipindi tofauti vya muda na kukuza vipindi maalum kwa uchambuzi wa kina.
Wakati wa maendeleo, mfumo unapaswa kusimamia kiotomatiki kuanza na kusimamisha programu ya "Dash" ili kuzuia matumizi yasiyo ya lazima ya rasilimali.

judge_stats.criteria: Baadhi ya data halisi ya mfululizo wa muda wa kifedha (mfano, "bei za hisa" au "bei za Bitcoin") inapakuliwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED> `src/data_loader.py` does not load any real financial time series data. The only loader is `load_dataset()`, which returns a placeholder dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}`. Mentions like `"Bitcoin prices"` and `"stock prices"` appear only in `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA`/`KEYWORDS` strings, not in actual data-loading code, and there is no evidence of file reading, API download, or dataset source.

reason: <UNSATISFIED> `src/data_loader.py` only contains a placeholder `load_dataset()` that returns `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` and a `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA` text string mentioning cleaning, but there is no actual code for handling missing values, detecting/removing outliers, or performing any data cleaning operations. The trajectory evidence also says there is no execution evidence confirming such functionality.

judge_stats.criteria: Dirisha la muda linatumika kubadilisha data ya mfululizo wa muda kuwa tatizo la kujifunza linalosimamiwa. Tafadhali tekeleza hili katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED> `src/data_loader.py` does not implement any actual time-windowing logic. The file only contains placeholder functions like `load_dataset()` returning `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` and `build_transforms()`, with the windowing requirement mentioned only as a string inside `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA`. There is no code that creates input/output sequences from time series data.

judge_stats.criteria: Mfano wa "LSTM" unatumika kwa utabiri wa mfululizo wa muda wa kifedha na unatekelezwa katika `src/model.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED> `src/model.py` does not implement an LSTM model. The file only defines `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA`, `KEYWORDS = ["LSTM", "lstm"]`, and a `build_model()` function that returns `"model placeholder"`. There is no LSTM class, no neural network code, and no financial time-series prediction logic in the provided code.
<SATISFIED> The file `results/prediction_results.txt` exists in the workspace and contains saved output: `('placeholder\r\n', None)`, which shows prediction results were written to the required path.

reason: <UNSATISFIED> `src/visualize.py` exists, but its content is only a minimal placeholder: it defines `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA`, `KEYWORDS = ["Dash", "lstm"]`, and a `main()` returning a dict. There is no `import dash`, no Dash app/layout/callbacks, and no interactive dashboard implementation for prediction results.
